items.title: Anthropic’s Alarming Mythos Findings Replicated With Off-the-Shelf AI, Researchers Say
items.summary: Security researchers used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 in an open-source harness to reproduce Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings for under $30 per scan.

items.title: Strategy Shares Pop as Bitcoin Holdings Flip Green, Near $61 Billion
items.summary: The Bitcoin-buying firm’s stockpile had shown losses on paper since early February.

items.title: Sam Altman’s World project launches major upgrade to fight deepfakes and bots
items.summary: The project is also expanding its partnerships with Tinder, Zoom and Docusign.

items.title: French finance minister backs euro-pegged stablecoins to compete with US
items.summary: The country's finance minister supported the Qivalis initiative, launched in 2025, to create a euro-pegged stablecoin under the MiCA framework.

items.title: US Government Moves Bitcoin Tied to $9 Billion Bitfinex Hack
items.summary: The U.S. government moved 8.2 Bitcoin, or greater than $600,000, that is linked to the $9 billion Bitfinex hack from 2016.

items.title: Beaten-down digital asset treasury names lead crypto stock surge as bitcoin hits $78,000
items.summary: Oil prices slumped as Trump said Iran committed to open the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. plans to acquire that country's enriched uranium as part of a deal.

items.title: Dogecoin Gold? A DOGE-Themed Company Is Joining the Tokenized Gold Rush
items.summary: The company Dogecoin Cash plans to develop tokens representing physical gold, following the lead of firms like Tether and Paxos.

items.title: Don’t get AI agents and stablecoin transfers? Enroll in CoinDesk University
items.summary: CoinDesk University’s School of Stablecoin and Agentic Commerce will give you the tools to move beyond understanding to action.

items.title: AI Agents Already Run a Fifth of DeFi, But Still Lose to Humans at Trading
items.summary: A new report finds that agents have taken over the predictable corners of DeFi, but humans still clear the table when trades get complex.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Bitcoin, Stocks Surge as Iran Says Strait of Hormuz Is 'Completely Open'
items.summary: Bitcoin spiked above $77,000 as stock indices set records, following word that Iran's Strait of Hormuz is open during the ceasefire.

items.title: Kraken Parent Payward Agrees to Acquire Derivatives Exchange Bitnomial for $550 Million
items.summary: The acquisition will give Kraken access to complete CFTC-licensed crypto derivatives infrastructure in the U.S.

items.title: Bitcoin price quietly sets new 10-week high as trader sees $88K in weeks
items.summary: Bitcoin price rallied above $77,000 amid cooling geopolitical tensions and record-high back-to-back closes for the S&P 500.

items.title: Neo co-founder proposes $461M treasury overhaul to end ‘trust me’ governance
items.summary: Neo’s proposed overhaul would restructure its foundation, return tokens to the community and impose formal oversight, as co-founders clash over governance and control.

items.title: Crypto execs ramp up security as wrench attacks increase
items.summary: Notable crypto execs descended on Paris Blockchain Week, bringing more attention to personal security as kidnapping and ransom attempts skyrocket.

items.title: Back in the black: Strategy surges 8% as bitcoin's rise to $77,000 puts holdings in profit
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed above its 100-day moving average, while Strategy moves back above its 200-week trend level.

items.title: Bitcoin rises, oil falls after Iran says Strait of Hormuz is open
items.summary: Bitcoin surged above $76,000 as oil futures fell 10% after Iran’s foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz open for the remainder of the ceasefire between the US, Israel and Iran.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 1.5%, leading index higher
items.summary: Hedera (HBAR) joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer, rising 1.4% from Thursday.

items.title: Telegram CEO Durov warns EU age-verification app could enable wider tracking
items.summary: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov cited claims the EU’s new age-check app was hacked in minutes, warning it could expand into wider online identity controls.

items.title: Bitcoin rises past $76,000, aiming at major breakout as oil plunges on Iran cooldown
items.summary: Iran's foreign minister said the Strait of Hormuz will remain completely open for the remainder of the ceasefire.

items.title: Ramp Network rolls out multichain wallet for simpler self-custody
items.summary: The crypto infrastructure company said its new wallet lets users buy, sell, swap and cash out digital assets in one app without relying on outside providers.

items.summary: The agency's chairman, Paul Atkins, sat down with two key commissioners to outline a shift away from enforcement.

items.title: France's finance minister calls for more euro stablecoins in sign of government policy shift
items.summary: The statements signal a potential shift in stance within the French government and its central bank.

items.title: Kraken's parent company Payward to acquire derivatives exchange Bitnomial for $550 million in cash and stock

items.title: Negative Funding Rates Hit Yearly High as Bitcoin Tests $76K

items.title: Flow Capital plans to tokenize $150M private credit fund via DigiFT: Report
